resultList.dtldesc: Experience sophisticated urban living with this spacious 4 BHK apartment available for sale in Prestige Misty Waters, Thimakka Layout, Bangalore. Situated in one of the city's sought-after residential communities, this ready-to-move residence offers elegant interiors, excellent connectivity and a host of modern amenities, making it an ideal choice for discerning homebuyers.::::Property Specifications::::Positioned on the 17th floor of a 23-storey tower, this north-facing apartment spans an area of 2375 sq. ft and enjoys abundant natural light, ventilation and serene garden views. The thoughtfully designed layout comprises four generously sized bedrooms and four well-appointed bathrooms, ensuring utmost comfort and privacy for the entire family. A balcony overlooking the greenery adds to the charm of the home and creates a refreshing ambience. The apartment features a combined living and dining area, while the modular kitchen is designed to enhance functionality and convenience. Offered in semi-furnished condition, the residence comes with quality fittings and elegant flooring combinations, including marble flooring in the common areas, wooden flooring in all bedrooms and vitrified tiles in the washrooms, lending a touch of refinement to the interiors. Being a ready-to-move property, it offers the advantage of immediate occupancy.::::Facilities::::Residents of Prestige Misty Waters enjoy access to a host of modern amenities that contribute to a comfortable and luxurious lifestyle. The property is equipped with three lifts for seamless vertical movement and provides one covered parking space. Essential facilities such as regular water supply, power backup and security arrangements ensure convenience and peace of mind. The well-maintained community is complemented by landscaped surroundings and a range of contemporary lifestyle amenities designed for all age groups.::::Locality::::Strategically located in Thimakka Layout, Bangalore, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to key destinations across the city. Jain Heritage School is situated nearby, making it convenient for families with children. Manipal Hospital is located within approximately 2 km, ensuring prompt access to healthcare facilities. The ongoing metro development in the vicinity is expected to further enhance connectivity and accessibility. In addition, shopping centres, supermarkets, banks and other everyday conveniences are easily accessible. Combining premium specifications, modern amenities and a prime location, this apartment presents an outstanding opportunity to own a prestigious home in Bangalore.

Three balconies provide ample natural light, fresh air and pleasant views of the surrounding greenery.The villa is currently unfurnished, allowing the new owner the flexibility to customise the interiors according to personal preferences and lifestyle needs. Four lifts within the development further add to convenience and accessibility.LocalitySituated in the sought-after locality of Kasavanahalli, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to key parts of Bangalore.
